notes: v0.16.49 — PRACTICE: correct mode descriptions + readable CAPTURE preview. Match length is now explicitly = length of the picked track across all modes. ARENA: most kills when the track ends wins. CAPTURE: hold the orb to bank time, get hit while holding → orb drops to centre, first to 60 seconds of total hold wins. PAINT: kills splash paint at the death spot, most floor covered when the track ends wins. CAPTURE preview animation now reads cleanly — holder grabs the orb, orb flashes brighter, the shooter waits a 2.5s grace window before opening fire, then bullets fly ~1–2s before hitting; a hold-time bar above the holder shows progress toward the 60s win condition. Windows only.
